jokesonyou.name: Joke's On You!
jokesonyou.alert.full_joke: You're supposed to be the Joke, but you're FULL! >:(
jokesonyou.alert.empty_slot: Nice try, but you need an empty slot! >:(
jokesonyou.alert.pockets: Hey! You can't hide behind full pockets! >:(
jokesonyou.tier1.0: Be a dear and clear a slot, won't you?
jokesonyou.tier1.1: Hello, it is quite important to take that joke over there
jokesonyou.tier1.2: Look buddy, your inventory- I mean inbox is full.
jokesonyou.tier1.3: Por favor, recoja el trozo de papel.
jokesonyou.tier1.5: The 'Q' key. It is next to 'W'. Please use it.
jokesonyou.tier1.6: Do you need a tutorial on how to drop items?
jokesonyou.tier1.7: Have you tried turning your greed off and on again?
jokesonyou.tier1.8: Oh, take your time. The whole server loves waiting.
jokesonyou.tier1.9: Space is finite, unlike your stubbornness.
jokesonyou.tier1.10: I see a lot of Dirt. Do you really need that?
jokesonyou.tier1.11: Just one slot. That's all I ask.
jokesonyou.tier1.12: Aww, your pockets are full. How unfortunate.
jokesonyou.tier1.13: Did you forget how to throw things away?
jokesonyou.tier1.16: Be a good protagonist and advance the plot.
jokesonyou.tier1.17: Behold! Your tax documents! Pick them up please.
jokesonyou.tier1.18: It's dangerous to go alone! Take this.
jokesonyou.tier1.19: A wild Joke appeared! It uses 'Enter Inventory'. It failed.
jokesonyou.tier1.20: Is your 'Q' key broken? Do you need tech support?
jokesonyou.tier1.21: I'm not despawning. I have all day.
jokesonyou.tier1.22: Knock knock. Who's there? A free slot. Open up.
jokesonyou.tier1.23: Your pockets look heavy. Let me help with advice: DROP IT.
jokesonyou.tier1.24: Swiper, no swiping! Just picking up!
jokesonyou.tier1.25: Message for you, sir! (It's on the floor).
jokesonyou.tier1.26: I bet you keep your room this messy too.
jokesonyou.tier1.27: Hint: The 'Drop' key is usually 'Q' or 'Ctrl+Q'.
jokesonyou.tier1.28: Are you waiting for a written invitation? This IS the invitation.
jokesonyou.tier1.32: I promise I don't bite. Hard.
jokesonyou.tier2.0: Don't be difficult. Pick. It. Up.
jokesonyou.tier2.1: HEY YOU! You dropped something. Yeah, that paper.
jokesonyou.tier2.2: You now have FOMO. Cure it with that joke on the floor.
jokesonyou.tier2.3: Your inventory management skills are tragic.
jokesonyou.tier2.4: Inventory Tetris won't save you from me.
jokesonyou.tier2.5: Hoarders: Minecraft Edition is looking great.
jokesonyou.tier2.6: Nobody loves cobblestone that much. Let it go.
jokesonyou.tier2.7: Are you running a pawn shop? CLEAR A SLOT.
jokesonyou.tier2.8: One man's trash is... well, apparently your whole inventory.
jokesonyou.tier2.9: You will die in about 30s. Stop it by picking up the paper.
jokesonyou.tier2.10: You hoard items like you hoard bad decisions.
jokesonyou.tier2.11: Nice exploit. Did you find that on Reddit?
jokesonyou.tier2.12: Error 404: Empty Slot Not Found. User is hopeless.
jokesonyou.tier2.13: You're not slick, you're just messy.
jokesonyou.tier2.14: I'm about to report you for 'Being Annoying'.
jokesonyou.tier2.15: Imagine being afraid of a piece of paper.
jokesonyou.tier2.16: Wow. So much junk. So little skill.
jokesonyou.tier2.17: Idiotic creature, cling to that paper with your life.
jokesonyou.tier2.18: The Joke is on the floor, but the clown is staring at it.
jokesonyou.tier2.19: Why do you have 13 Rotten Flesh? Are you eating that?
jokesonyou.tier2.20: I hope a Creeper sneaks up on you while you organize.
jokesonyou.tier2.21: You are single-handedly ruining the pacing of this game.
jokesonyou.tier2.22: Drop the Andesite. Nobody likes Andesite.
jokesonyou.tier2.23: I am judging you. The server is judging you. God is judging you.
jokesonyou.tier2.24: Stop staring at me and PRESS Q.
jokesonyou.tier2.25: Your inventory looks like a dumpster fire.
jokesonyou.tier2.26: If I had legs, I would kick your shins.
jokesonyou.tier2.27: You are the bottleneck of this entire operation.
jokesonyou.tier2.29: Even a Villager has better trade offers than your empty slots.
jokesonyou.tier2.30: I am rapidly approaching your location. Pick. It. Up.
jokesonyou.tier2.31: Do you want a penalty? Because this is how you get penalties.
jokesonyou.tier2.32: You're acting like an NPC right now.
jokesonyou.tier2.33: Acting busy won't save you from the inevitable.
jokesonyou.tier3.0: Stop stalling and accept your fate.
jokesonyou.tier3.1: Drop your trash and pick up the special joke!
jokesonyou.tier3.3: Make room, or I will make room FOR you.
jokesonyou.tier3.4: I'm giving you three seconds to stop being annoying.
jokesonyou.tier3.5: Every second you wait, I get angrier.
jokesonyou.tier3.7: DROP IT OR I DROP YOU.
jokesonyou.tier3.10: I AM IN YOUR WALLS (AND SOON YOUR INVENTORY).
jokesonyou.tier3.13: TAKE THE LETTER, THE GODS DEMAND IT
jokesonyou.tier3.14: You little-shit, wipe yourself with that paper on the floor.
jokesonyou.tier3.15: I WILL DELETE YOUR DIAMONDS IF YOU WAIT ONE MORE SECOND.
jokesonyou.tier3.16: LOOK AT ME. I AM THE INVENTORY NOW.
jokesonyou.tier3.17: YOUR FREE TRIAL OF LIVING HAS EXPIRED.
jokesonyou.tier3.18: SCREAMING WON'T CLEAR A SLOT. DROPPING ITEMS WILL.
jokesonyou.tier3.21: I WILL TURN YOUR ARMOR INTO AIR.
jokesonyou.tier3.22: DO YOU WANT TO PLAY A GAME? PICK IT UP.
jokesonyou.tier3.24: CEASE YOUR EXISTENCE OR CEASE YOUR GREED.
jokesonyou.tier3.25: THE VOID IS CALLING. IT WANTS YOUR ITEMS.
jokesonyou.tier3.26: LAST CHANCE BEFORE I FORCE MY WAY IN.
jokesonyou.tier3.28: BLOOD FOR THE BLOOD GOD, SLOTS FOR THE JOKE CARD.
jokesonyou.tier3.29: I WILL HAUNT YOUR MINECRAFT WORLD FOREVER.
jokesonyou.item.lore.0: All the Jokes are on you!
jokesonyou.item.lore.1: To put them on someone else
jokesonyou.item.lore.2: Try to Drop this into someone else's inventory
jokesonyou.item.lore.3: Players who had the Joke on them the least, will win
jokesonyou.commands.game_paused: Game is paused. Please, return The Joke to %s
jokesonyou.admin.cant_be_removed: Joke isn't on the server, card isn't removed!
jokesonyou.rules.intro:
§fHi §6%s§7... Here are the rules of the game:
§f1. One of you has the Joke.
§c2. As soon as you get the Joke, time starts ticking...
§f3. Throw the card to another player to pass it.
   §cWAIT FOR THE 'JOKE IS NOT ON YOU' TITLE!
   §c(Or check manually: '/jokesonyou amIJoke')
§a4. Player with the LEAST time holding the Joke wins.
§e5. Keep 1 inventory slot empty to catch the Joke.\n§c6. Filling your inventory to block the Joke is CHEATING you WILL be punished!
§47. Time DOES NOT STOP if you disconnect or hide the card.
   §7§o(You are only punishing yourself!)
§68. Have fun!
